# Here Handyman > Professional home repair and remodeling services with 25+ years of experience serving Westchester County, NY and Will County, IL communities

## Getting Started
Quick paths to getting your home project completed
- [Free Estimate Request](https://www.herehandyman.com/#contact): Get a no-obligation quote for your project in under 24 hours
- [Call Us Directly](tel:+1516350081): Same-day service available at (516) 350-0801 for urgent repairs
- [Service Areas Check](#service-areas): Verify we serve your location in NY or IL with our interactive coverage map

## Core Services
Complete handyman and remodeling solutions for homeowners
- [Kitchen Remodeling](#kitchen-remodeling): Full kitchen renovations, custom cabinetry, quartz countertops, and island construction
- [Bathroom Renovation](#bathroom-remodeling): Walk-in showers with glass doors, modern vanities, tile work, and complete bathroom updates
- [General Handyman Services](#general-handyman): Plumbing repairs, electrical work, drywall installation, interior/exterior painting, and home maintenance
- [Flooring Installation](#flooring-services): Hardwood refinishing, tile flooring, vinyl plank installation, and subfloor preparation
- [Exterior Home Services](#exterior-services): Siding repair, exterior painting, deck construction, window installation, and gutter maintenance
- [Emergency Repairs](#emergency-services): Same-day response for plumbing leaks, electrical outages, storm damage, and urgent home repair needs

## Service Coverage
Local communities we proudly serve with reliable, professional service
- [New York Service Areas](#ny-service-areas): White Plains, Scarsdale, Yonkers, Hartsdale, and all Westchester County communities
- [Illinois Service Areas](#il-service-areas): Plainfield, Naperville, Joliet, Bolingbrook, Lisle, and greater Will County area

## Service Specializations
Detailed breakdown of our professional services and expertise

### Kitchen Remodeling Excellence
- Complete kitchen renovations and custom remodels
- Custom cabinetry design, fabrication, and installation
- Kitchen island construction with electrical integration
- Premium countertop installation (quartz, granite, laminate)
- decorative backsplash installation and tile work
- Professional appliance installation and plumbing connections
- Modern kitchen lighting and electrical system upgrades

### Bathroom Renovation Specialists
- Full bathroom renovations and complete gut jobs
- Luxury walk-in shower installation with frameless glass doors
- Modern vanity and sink installation with custom countertops
- Professional tile flooring and wall tile installation
- Plumbing fixture updates and complete bathroom repairs
- Bathroom lighting and exhaust fan installation
- Professional shower door installation and waterproofing systems

### Comprehensive Handyman Services
- Professional plumbing repairs and fixture installation
- Licensed electrical work and outlet/switch installation
- Expert drywall repair, patching, and new installation
- Professional interior and exterior painting services
- Custom carpentry and detailed woodwork
- Professional TV mounting and installation services
- Expert furniture assembly and installation
- Comprehensive home maintenance and repair services

### Professional Flooring Installation
- Expert hardwood flooring installation and refinishing
- Professional tile flooring (ceramic, porcelain, natural stone)
- Modern vinyl plank and laminate flooring installation
- Professional flooring repairs and expert patching
- Subfloor preparation and repair services
- Professional transition strip and baseboard installation

### Exterior Home Services
- Professional exterior home repairs and maintenance
- Expert siding repair and complete installation
- Professional exterior painting and surface preparation
- Custom deck and porch repairs and new construction
- Professional window and door installation
- Expert gutter cleaning and repair services
- Professional exterior caulking and weatherproofing

### Emergency Repair Services
- Same-day emergency repairs for urgent situations
- Professional plumbing leak detection and water damage repair
- Licensed electrical issue diagnosis and outage resolution
- Professional storm damage repairs and restoration
- Urgent home maintenance needs and emergency fixes

## Professional Service Process
Our proven 5-step approach to every home improvement project
1. **Initial Contact**: Call our professional team or submit online form for free, detailed estimate
2. **Comprehensive Project Assessment**: Thorough evaluation and transparent, detailed quote
3. **Flexible Scheduling**: Convenient appointment time that works perfectly for your schedule
4. **Professional Service Execution**: Clean, efficient work with meticulous attention to detail
5. **Final Inspection and Approval**: Complete customer satisfaction and quality guarantee

## Service Availability and Hours
When you can reach our professional team and schedule service
- **Monday-Friday**: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM - Full service availability
- **Saturday**: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM - Weekend service available
- **Sunday**: Emergency services only - Urgent repair situations
- **Emergency Response**: Same-day service available for urgent needs
- **Service Coverage**: White Plains NY, Plainfield IL, and all surrounding communities
